title: oxydectes chaetocalyx
intro: Oxydectes chaetocalyx, also known as the hairy calathea, is a species of flowering plant in the Marantaceae family. The hairy calathea has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and even exhibiting antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, the hairy calathea can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
